# Northwind Traders — Power BI Model Documentation
**Generated by:** Claude Desktop via Power BI Modeling MCP
**Source dataset:** Kaggle — jeetahirwar/northwind-traders
**Tables:** 7 | **Total rows:** ~3,168 | **Date range:** 2013-07-04 to 2015-05-06

---

## Model Overview

Northwind Traders is a fictional gourmet food company that sells specialty products
(beverages, condiments, meat, seafood, etc.) to customers worldwide.
This Power BI model tracks their sales orders, product catalogue, customers,
employees, shipping carriers, and product categories.

**Fact tables:** order_details (grain: one row per product per order)
**Supporting fact:** orders (grain: one row per order header)
**Dimension tables:** products, customers, employees, categories, shippers, DimDate

---

## Data Summary

| Table | Rows | Primary Key | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|-------------|
| orders | 830 | orderID | Sales order headers |
| order_details | 2,155 | orderID + productID | Line items per order |
| products | 77 | productID | Product catalogue |
| customers | 91 | customerID | Customer master |
| employees | 9 | employeeID | Staff records |
| categories | 8 | categoryID | Product categories |
| shippers | 3 | shipperID | Shipping carriers |

| From Table | From Column | To Table | To Column | Type | Filter |
|------------|-------------|----------|-----------|------|--------|
| order_details | orderID | orders | orderID | Many → One | Single |

| orders | customerID | customers | customerID | Many → One | Single |
| orders | employeeID | employees | employeeID | Many → One | Single |
| orders | shipperID | shippers | shipperID | Many → One | Single |
| products | categoryID | categories | categoryID | Many → One | Single |
| DimDate | Date | orders | orderDate | One → Many | Single |

---

## Table Details

### orders
*One row per sales order header.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| orderID | Integer | Unique identifier for each order. Primary key. |
| customerID | Text | 5-character code identifying the customer. Foreign key to customers. |
| employeeID | Integer | ID of the employee who processed and owns this order. Foreign key to employees. |
| orderDate | Date | The date the customer placed the order. Connected to DimDate. |
| requiredDate | Date | The date the customer requested delivery by. Used for delivery performance tracking. |
| shippedDate | Date | The actual date the order was dispatched. Null if not yet shipped. |
| shipperID | Integer | The carrier used to ship this order. Foreign key to shippers. |
| freight | Decimal | Shipping cost charged to the customer for this order, in USD. |

### order_details
*One row per product line within an order.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| orderID | Integer | The order this line belongs to. Foreign key to orders. |
| productID | Integer | The product on this line. Foreign key to products. |
| unitPrice | Decimal | The selling price per unit at the time of the order. May differ from the current products[unitPrice]. |
| quantity | Integer | Number of units of this product ordered on this line. |
| discount | Decimal | Discount rate applied to this line. Stored as a decimal (0.00 = no discount, 0.25 = 25% off). Net price = unitPrice × quantity × (1 - discount). |

### products
*Product catalogue.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| productID | Integer | Unique product identifier. Primary key. |
| productName | Text | The commercial name of the product as sold to customers. |
| quantityPerUnit | Text | Describes the packaging (e.g. "24 - 12 oz bottles", "10 boxes x 20 bags"). |
| unitPrice | Decimal | Current standard selling price per unit. Note: historical order prices are in order_details[unitPrice]. |
| discontinued | Integer | 0 = product is active and available. 1 = product is discontinued, no longer sold. |
| categoryID | Integer | Which product category this belongs to. Foreign key to categories. |

### customers
*Customer master data — 91 customers across 21 countries.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| customerID | Text | Unique 5-character customer code. Primary key. (e.g. ALFKI, VINET) |
| companyName | Text | Legal name of the customer's company. |
| contactName | Text | Full name of the primary contact at the customer for ordering. |
| contactTitle | Text | Job title of the primary contact (e.g. Sales Representative, Owner). |
| city | Text | City where the customer's primary office is located. |
| country | Text | Country where the customer operates. |

### employees
*9 employees across New York (USA) and London (UK) offices.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| employeeID | Integer | Unique employee identifier. Primary key. |
| employeeName | Text | Full name of the employee (first and last name combined). |
| title | Text | Official job title (e.g. Sales Representative, Vice President Sales). |
| city | Text | City where the employee is based. |
| country | Text | Country where the employee is based (USA or UK). |
| reportsTo | Integer | The employeeID of this employee's direct manager. Self-referencing hierarchy. Null for the top-level manager. |

### categories
*8 product categories.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| categoryID | Integer | Unique category identifier. Primary key. |
| categoryName | Text | Name of the product category (Beverages, Condiments, Confections, Dairy Products, Grains/Cereals, Meat/Poultry, Produce, Seafood). |
| description | Text | A brief description of what types of products belong in this category. |

### shippers
*3 shipping carriers.*

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| shipperID | Integer | Unique shipper identifier. Primary key. |
| companyName | Text | Name of the shipping carrier company (Speedy Express, United Package, Federal Shipping). |

---

## Measures

### Revenue

| Measure | Formula | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| Total Revenue | SUMX(order_details, unitPrice × quantity × (1 - discount)) | Net revenue after discounts |
| Total Orders | DISTINCTCOUNT(orders[orderID]) | Unique orders placed |
| Average Order Value | DIVIDE([Total Revenue], [Total Orders]) | Mean revenue per order |
| Total Units Sold | SUM(order_details[quantity]) | Total units across all lines |
| Total Freight | SUM(orders[freight]) | Total shipping costs |
| Average Discount % | AVERAGE(order_details[discount]) | Mean discount rate |
| Revenue per Unit | DIVIDE([Total Revenue], [Total Units Sold]) | Revenue per unit sold |

### Customers

| Measure | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Total Customers | Distinct customers with at least one order |
| Avg Orders per Customer | Order frequency per customer |
| Avg Revenue per Customer | Revenue contribution per customer |

### Products

| Measure | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Products Sold | Distinct products appearing in orders |
| Active Products | Products where discontinued = 0 |
| Discontinued Products | Products where discontinued = 1 |
| Avg Unit Price | Average price on order lines |

### Employees

| Measure | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Total Employees | Count of all employees |
| Revenue per Employee | Average revenue per employee |
| Orders per Employee | Average orders handled per employee |

### Time Intelligence (requires DimDate)

| Measure | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Revenue MTD | Month-to-date revenue |
| Revenue QTD | Quarter-to-date revenue |
| Revenue YTD | Year-to-date revenue |
| Revenue Previous Month | Prior month total |
| Revenue Previous Year | Same period last year |
| MoM Growth % | Month-over-month growth |
| YoY Growth % | Year-over-year growth |
| Rolling 3 Month Revenue | Last 3 months rolling |
| Rolling 12 Month Revenue | Last 12 months rolling |
| 3 Month Moving Average | Average of 3-month window |

---

## Calculated Columns

| Table | Column | Logic |
|-------|--------|-------|
| orders | FreightBand | Low (<25) / Medium (25–75) / High (>75) |
| orders | DeliveryStatus | On Time / Late / Not Shipped |
| order_details | LineTotalBand | Small (<100) / Medium (100–500) / Large (>500) |
| products | PriceTier | Budget (<15) / Standard (15–50) / Premium (>50) |
